Portfolio.subtitle: Professional tarps and nets for every application – tailored to your requirements.

pvc.title: PVC Tarps
pvc.description: High-quality PVC tarps for professional use on construction sites. Robust, weatherproof and durable – ideal for protecting buildings and materials.

dust.title: Dust Protection Nets
dust.description: Effective dust protection nets significantly reduce dust pollution on construction sites. They protect residents and the environment from fine dust particles.

blast.title: Blast Protection Nets
blast.description: Professional blast protection nets for sandblasting and shot blasting. Maximum safety in industrial blasting processes.

personenauffang.title: Safety Nets
personenauffang.description: Reliable safety nets for maximum protection on construction sites. Protect workers during elevated work according to current standards.

oesenband.title: Eyelet Band Tarps
oesenband.description: Professional eyelet band tarps for sandblasting and shot blasting. Maximum safety in industrial blasting processes.

keder.title: Keder Tarps
keder.description: Reliable keder tarps for construction sites in wind, rain and snow. Enable year-round work under optimal conditions.

About.description: TORİ Tarps & Nets is your reliable partner for professional tarp and net solutions in construction. With years of experience and a dedicated team, we offer tailored solutions for safety, environmental protection and weather protection on your construction site.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Highest safety standards for all our products and installations. Certified according to current standards.

environment.title: Environmental Protection
environment.description: Sustainable materials and environmentally friendly processes. We protect the surroundings of your construction site.

fastInstall.title: Fast Installation
fastInstall.description: Professional and fast installation by experienced teams. On time and reliable.

team.title: Experienced Team
team.description: Our qualified team advises you competently and finds the optimal solution for every challenge.

Referenzen.subtitle: Selected projects that demonstrate our competence and experience in tarp and net installation.

pvcInstall.title: PVC Tarp Installation
pvcInstall.description: Complete cladding of a high-rise project with custom PVC tarps for year-round weather protection.

kederInstall.title: Keder Tarp Installation
kederInstall.description: Professional keder tarp installation for a commercial project. Precision-fit solutions for optimal protection.

oesenbandInstall.title: Eyelet Band Tarp Installation
oesenbandInstall.description: Installation of eyelet band tarps for industrial applications. Robust and flexible fastening solutions.

blastNets.title: Blast Protection Nets
blastNets.description: Installation of blast protection nets for a large industrial project in Hamburg. Protection of surrounding buildings during sandblasting.

dustNets.title: Dust Protection Nets
dustNets.description: Large-scale dust protection nets for the renovation of a historic building in Hamburg city centre.

personenauffangInstall.title: Safety Net Installation
personenauffangInstall.description: Installation of safety nets for maximum worker protection on a large construction site.

Kontakt.subtitle: Do you have questions or need a custom quote? We look forward to your message!

Shop.title: Coming Soon

Footer.brandDescription: Your reliable partner for professional tarp and net solutions in construction. Safety, environmental protection and weather protection – all from one source.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.subtitle: Information on the processing of your personal data in accordance with GDPR.

sections.title: Controller
sections.intro: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:

sections.title: General Information on Data Processing
sections.body: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. Personal data is only collected on this website to the extent technically necessary. Processing is carried out in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

sections.title: Hosting
sections.body: Our website is hosted by {provider}. A data processing agreement in accordance with Art. 28 GDPR has been concluded with Hostinger.

sections.title: Access Data (Server Log Files)
sections.intro: When you visit this website, the following information is automatically collected:
sections.legal_basis: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in technical security).

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body:
We use cookies to improve the user experience. On your first visit, a cookie banner (provided by {provider}) will be displayed, where you can manage your consent.

The cookie policy and an overview of cookies can be found here: [View Cookie Policy] (automatically inserted by CookieYes)

sections.title: Contact Form & Communication
sections.body: If you contact us via contact form or email, we will store your details in order to process your enquiry.

sections.title: Google Analytics
sections.body: This website uses Google Analytics. Google uses cookies to analyse how the website is used. The data collected is transmitted to Google servers in the USA.
sections.legal_basis: Your consent pursuant to Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR

sections.title: Integrated Third-Party Services

services.name: Google Fonts
services.desc: Used to display fonts. When loaded, data (e.g. IP address) is transmitted to Google.

services.name: Google Maps
services.desc: Used to display interactive maps. Data (IP, location, possibly cookies) is sent to Google.

services.name: YouTube Videos
services.desc: We use YouTube to embed videos. Personal data may be transmitted to Google when playing.

services.name: Instagram Feed
services.desc: An Instagram feed is embedded on some pages. Instagram may collect data if you are logged in.

services.name: WhatsApp Contact Button
services.desc: If you contact us via the WhatsApp button, your phone number will be visible. Use is voluntary.

sections.note: All services are only activated after active consent via the cookie banner.

sections.title: Your Rights as a Data Subject
Right to Lodge a Complaint
sections.intro: If you believe that your data is being processed unlawfully, you can lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority:
sections.authority_name: The Hamburg Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information

sections.title: Currency
sections.body: This privacy policy is valid from {date} and is updated regularly.

sections.title: VAT
sections.intro: VAT identification number in accordance with § 27 a of the German VAT Act:

sections.intro: Responsible for content in accordance with § 55 para. 2 RStV:
